title: spec ambiguous on current_channel wire position and scheduler value
description: The announce wire format in spec/05-routing.md does not include current_channel byte. Placement after seq_num in signed_data is clear from task but wire offset and what value scheduler should announce (current RX channel for CCP-9) is ambiguous without spec update. Also affects LCI, processor, test vectors, cross-impl tests. Human decision needed on exact format, default channel, API for scheduler current_channel.
close_reason: 3 full codereview passes (children closed) with no remaining P0-P1. Specs, LCI, test vectors updated per task. bd ready --limit 5 run. Subagents used for parallel bd/create and reviews.
